zh.lifeSummary: 當Cicely Champernon於大約1330年出生在英國戴文莫德波利時，她的父親Thomas Champernoun17歲，母親Eleanor Rohaut13歲。她於大約1347年與Simon le Fleming在英國戴文結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1363年在愛爾蘭庫迪 米亞斯斯藍享年34歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Cicely Champernon于大约1330年出生在英国戴文莫德波利时，她的父亲Thomas Champernoun17岁，母亲Eleanor Rohaut13岁。她于大约1347年与Simon le Fleming在英国戴文结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1363年在爱尔兰庫迪 米亞斯斯藍享年34岁。

nameMeanings.name: Cicely
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of   Cecily .  This was a common form of the name in the Middle Ages, and in the 20th century was well known as the name of the British actress and singer  Cicely Courtneidge  (  1893–1980 ).

variants.name: Cecily
meanings: Medieval vernacular English form of   Cecilia .

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Cicely Champernon was born about 1330, in Modbury, Devon, England, her father, Thomas Champernoun, was 17 and her mother, Eleanor Rohaut, was 13. She married Simon le Fleming about 1347, in Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. She died in 1363, in Slane, County Meath, Ireland, at the age of 34.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Cicely Champernon est née environ 1330, à Modbury, Devon, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Champernoun, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Eleanor Rohaut, avait 13 ans. Elle a épousé Simon le Fleming environ 1347, à Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1363, à Slane, County Meath, Irlande, à l’âge de 34 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Cicely Champernon um 1330 in Modbury, Devon, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Champernoun 17 und ihre Mutter Eleanor Rohaut 13. Sie hat um 1347 in Devon, England Simon le Fleming geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1363 im Alter von 34 Jahren in Slane, County Meath, Irland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Cicely Champernon è nata il circa 1330 nel Modbury, Devon, England, sua padre, Thomas Champernoun, aveva 17 anni e sua madre, Eleanor Rohaut, aveva 13 anni. Lei sposato Simon le Fleming circa 1347, nel Devon, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1363, nel Slane, County Meath, Irlanda, all'età di 34 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Cicely Champernonが約1330年にイギリスデボンモドブリーで生まれた時，父Thomas Champernounは17歳，母Eleanor Rohautは13歳であった。約1347年にイギリスデボンでSimon le Flemingと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1363年にアイルランドコウントイ メアススランで34歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Cicely Champernon(이)가 대략 1330년 영국 데폰 모드버이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Champernoun(은)는 17세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eleanor Rohaut(은)는 13세였다. 그녀는 대략 1347년 영국 데폰에서 Simon le Fleming(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1363년 아일랜드 카운티 미스 슬랜에서 34세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Cicely Champernon nasceu aproximadamente 1330, em Modbury, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Champernoun, tinha 17 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor Rohaut, tinha 13 anos. Ela casou-se com Simon le Fleming aproximadamente 1347, em Devon, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1363, em Slane, County Meath, Irlanda, com 34 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Cicely Champernon родилась около 1330 г. в местности модбури, девон, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas Champernoun было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Eleanor Rohaut, 13. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Simon le Fleming около 1347 г. в местности девон, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1363 г. в местности слан, коунти мит, Ирландия в возрасте 34 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Cicely Champernon nació aproximadamente 1330, en Modbury, Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Champernoun, tenía 17 años y su mamá, Eleanor Rohaut, tenía 13 años. Se casó con Simon le Fleming aproximadamente 1347, en Devon, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió en 1363, en Slane, County Meath, Irlanda, a la edad de 34 años.
